column8: port td5_ai_update_traffic_route_plan mirrors orig 7-stage FSM (recycle/heading/edge/normal/target/steer/yield); L5 audit acknowledges strict polarity branch & InitActorTrackSegmentPlacement target; minor stage-7 control-flow simplification

port td5_ai_update_actor_track_bounds matches orig: 4 probe ComputeTrackSpanProgress calls + min/max scan + 4 ComputeSignedTrackOffset writes to RS[0x10..0x13]; span_norm keyed route_byte read preserved
port td5_ai_classify_track_offset_clamp_v2 byte-faithful: primary vs secondary route, single walker apply, SampleTrackTargetPoint two-call clamp returning 0/1/2; matches orig 0x004368A0-0x00436A65

port td5_ai_update_race_actors splits orig inline per-actor work into td5_ai_refresh_route_state + ai_update_single_racer/traffic helpers; D1/D2/D4 documented partial-port residuals; D3 closed via FWD_TRACK_COMP_SQRT

port td5_ai_advance_track_script mirrors orig prologue+flags+12-opcode switch; flag-0x10 reverse-aware extension (forward throttle when lspd<=-0x100) is documented intentional fix for solo PlayerIsAI cascade
